aiInsight: Manchester City Over 6.5 SOT against Crystal Palace (home) is our strongest pick; they average 7.8 SOT at home and have hit this line in 70% of their league games. Avoid away underdogs playing deep blocks; Burnley Over 2.5 SOT away at Chelsea, for instance, carries high risk given their defensive setup and expected low possession. Overall card confidence is cautiously optimistic, concentrating on high-volume attacking teams and sidestepping matches with ambiguous tactical setups.
